scripts.bbuild: npm run build -w packages/shared-types && npm run build -w apps/backend
scripts.btest: npm run tbuild && npm run test -w apps/backend
scripts.btest:watch: npm run tbuild && npm run test:watch -w apps/backend
scripts.ftest: npm run tbuild && npm run test -w apps/frontend
scripts.ftest:watch: npm run tbuild && npm run test:watch -w apps/frontend
scripts.verify: npm run tlint && npm run blint && npm run flint && npm run knip && npm run tbuild && npm run btypecheck && npm run bbuild && npm run ftypecheck
scripts.test: npm run btest && npm run ftest
